title: taraxacum binilobatum
intro: Taraxacum binilobatum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Taraxacum binilobatum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
